title: Tavern Stop, Sword Quest Begins
summary: The adventurers entered a local tavern, where they had a brief interaction with the bartender. Following this encounter, they quickly departed the establishment, setting off on a new quest to locate and acquire a specific sword.

title: Quest for the Mad King God's Throne
summary: The adventuring party set out with a clear objective: to confront the king and locate the mythical throne of the Mad King God. Their journey successfully led them to the throne, where they anticipated a significant reward upon its discovery.
locations: throne of the Mad King God
quests: Find where the throne of the Mad King God was
